description: Auth bypass CVEs reclassified as DI under widened definition (April 2026)

methodology.query: OSV API query for Spring Security, Tomcat NP components; filter to CWE-287, CWE-289, CWE-306, CWE-345, CWE-693, CWE-863 at CRITICAL/HIGH severity; 2018-2026 window
methodology.di_definition: Untrusted input that is interpreted as code, controls a file path, changes a security decision, or is injected into server-side template output
methodology.auth_bypass_rationale: Auth bypass via input manipulation shares the same pattern as injection: user input changes what a security decision returns. These are not WAF-detectable because the inputs are syntactically valid.
methodology.exclusion_criteria: CVEs where auth bypass is secondary to DoS (e.g., CWE-400 primary + CWE-863 secondary) are excluded

seven_year_backtest_additions.summary: Spring Security authorization bypass via insufficient signature verification
seven_year_backtest_additions.rationale: Untrusted input (crafted token) bypasses signature verification, changing auth decision

seven_year_backtest_additions.summary: Insufficiently protected credentials and improper authentication in Spring Security
seven_year_backtest_additions.rationale: Improper authentication allows bypass of credential checks
EXCLUDED: Primary mechanism is DoS (CWE-400). CWE-863 is secondary — auth bypass is a consequence of resource exhaustion, not untrusted input changing a security decision

seven_year_backtest_additions.summary: Authorization bypass via RegexRequestMatcher in Spring Security
seven_year_backtest_additions.rationale: Crafted request path bypasses regex-based auth rules. Input directly changes authorization decision.
seven_year_backtest_additions.note: Appears in both spring-security-core and spring-security-web; counted as 1 event

seven_year_backtest_additions.summary: Spring Security authorization rules bypassed via forward or include dispatch
seven_year_backtest_additions.rationale: Request dispatch mechanism bypasses authorization checks. Crafted request changes auth outcome.

seven_year_backtest_additions.summary: Erroneous authentication pass in Spring Security
seven_year_backtest_additions.rationale: Authentication logic incorrectly passes. Untrusted request reaches auth check and gets wrong answer.

twelve_month_backtest_additions.summary: Spring Security authorization bypass for method security annotations on private methods
Spring Security annotation detection mechanism has authorization bypass
Apache Tomcat CLIENT_CERT authentication does not fail as expected
PyJWT accepts unknown crit header extensions, bypassing JWT validation

patch_events.note: May be slightly less due to 7-day merge windows
